name: Reviewinc
description:
ReviewInc offers white-label reputation management services and is specifically tailor-made for marketing agencies and resellers. It provides you with all the tools you need for review monitoring, generation, and management services to offer to your clients.

Source: G2

Features:

➡️Offers location-specific grading and reporting tools that compile client reviews and rankings into an interactive report.

➡️Partners can easily customize the platform's colors to match their agency's branding, with options for individual clients to maintain their brand identity.

➡️Features an admin portal with comprehensive reports for all accounts, quick logins, customer setup, and access control.

Benefits: 

✅ Customers enjoy the reporting capabilities and the deep insights the tool has to offer 

✅Does what it says and helps garner positive reviews and feedback 

Cons: 

❌Offer limited integrations

❌Not cost-effective 

❌Limited features 

‍

Offers Custom Pricing Options
what_people_say:
“We now create a Reviews page on each of our client's websites do display testimonials their clients have given them. We make this part of our Local SEO package and it's a client favorite. Then we have our clients send the link out to their clients, and ask them for their reviews - most are happy to give the feedback.”
‍

“The back end isn't very user friendly and the reports aren't exactly what I am looking for. Also, Some of the Schema markup has issues, but we have been in contact with the support team and they have fixed it right up. Other than that I personally don't have any complaints, and the one issue I did have has beeen fixed.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
